parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Agreement year filter. Repeat query key for multiple values.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Exact target company names to include.

parameters.name: acquirer
parameters.description: Exact acquirer company names to include.

parameters.name: standardId
parameters.description: Clause taxonomy standard IDs. Parent IDs expand to include descendant taxonomy nodes.

parameters.name: transactionPriceTotal
parameters.description: Reserved for future filtering by total transaction price. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transactionPriceStock
parameters.description: Reserved for future filtering by stock consideration value. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transactionPriceCash
parameters.description: Reserved for future filtering by cash consideration value. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transactionPriceAssets
parameters.description: Reserved for future filtering by asset consideration value. Accepted but currently ignored by the query engine.

parameters.name: transactionConsideration
parameters.description: Transaction consideration category values from the agreement record.

parameters.name: targetType
parameters.description: Target company type values (for example `public` or `private`).

parameters.name: acquirerType
parameters.description: Acquirer company type values (for example `public` or `private`).

parameters.name: targetIndustry
parameters.description: Target industry values from normalized agreement metadata.

parameters.name: acquirerIndustry
parameters.description: Acquirer industry values from normalized agreement metadata.

parameters.name: dealStatus
parameters.description: Deal status values (for example announced, completed, terminated).

parameters.name: attitude
parameters.description: Deal attitude values (for example friendly or hostile).

parameters.name: dealType
parameters.description: Deal type values from agreement metadata.

parameters.name: purpose
parameters.description: Strategic purpose values from agreement metadata.

parameters.name: targetPe
parameters.description: Target private-equity backed filter. Supported values: `true`, `false`.

parameters.name: acquirerPe
parameters.description: Acquirer private-equity backed filter. Supported values: `true`, `false`.

parameters.name: transactionSize
parameters.description: Legacy transaction size bucket labels (for example `100M - 250M`, `20B+`).

parameters.name: transactionType
parameters.description: Legacy transaction type labels (`Strategic`, `Financial`).

parameters.name: considerationType
parameters.description: Legacy consideration labels (`All stock`, `All cash`, `Mixed`).

parameters.name: agreementUuid
parameters.description: Filter to one agreement UUID.

parameters.name: sectionUuid
parameters.description: Filter to one section UUID.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort key. One of: `year`, `target`, `acquirer`.

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Sort direction. One of: `asc`, `desc`.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: 1-based page number.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: Page size. Effective max is 10 for unauthenticated callers and 100 for authenticated callers.
